items.title: Crucial win over Liverpool lifts West Ham away from relegation danger
items.summary: A Cornelia Kapocs own goal is enough for West Ham to secure a 1-0 away win over Liverpool, as the East London side move seven points clear of the relegation play-off place in th...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Gaikwad: We 'didn't have any idea' how Chepauk pitch would play
items.summary: CSK were reduced to 37 for 4 batting first, before GT comfortably chased down the 159 target
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Overnight leader Ham braves conditions to win Singapore Open
items.summary: Korea’s Jeongwoo Ham won the $2 million Singapore Open, securing a spot in The Open alongside runner-up Cameron John amid tough conditions.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
